subsection.heading: General Authority.—
subsection.content: An eligible person under section 53303 of this title may establish a construction reserve fund for the construction, reconstruction, reconditioning, or acquisition of a new vessel or for other purposes authorized by this chapter.

subsection.heading: Application of Certain Laws and Regulations.—
subsection.content: The fund shall be established, maintained, expended, and used as provided by this chapter and regulations prescribed jointly by the Secretary of Transportation and the Secretary of the Treasury.

html:tr.style: font-size:6pt; border-bottom:1px solid black; border-top:1px solid black; -uslm-lc:h1;

html:td.html:p: 46 App.:1161(b) (1st sentence words before 6th comma and between 10th and 16th commas).

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;
html:td.html:p: June 29, 1936, ch. 858, title V, § 511(b) (1st sentence words before 6th comma and between 10th and 16th commas, last sentence), as added Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 849, 54 Stat. 1106; June 17, 1943, ch. 130, subdiv. (a), 57 Stat. 157; July 17, 1952, ch. 939, § 9, 66 Stat. 762; Pub. L. 97–31, § 12(92)(A), Aug. 6, 1981, 95 Stat. 161.

html:td.style: text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt;
text-align:left; vertical-align:top; border-right:1px solid black; border-left:1px solid black; padding-right:2pt; padding-left: 2pt;
text-align:right; vertical-align:top; border-left:1px solid black; padding-left: 2pt;

note.p: In subsection (a), the words “necessary to carrying out the policy set forth in section 1101 of this Appendix” are omitted as unnecessary.
